AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Namespace AccoRevit.Addin.Utils

Classes

AccuracyListBuilder

Builds a sorted list of valid unit accuracy values for Revit Autodesk.Revit.DB.FormatOptions based on the specified unit.

AnnotationCategoryMap

Provides a bidirectional mapping between logical annotation categories used in configuration XML and Revit built-in category tokens stored as strings.

AnnotationConfigurationService

Provides load/save operations for the annotation configuration XML using XmlSerializer.

AnnotationUtils

Extension methods that support XML-driven annotation rule matching and tag placement.

AsciiCleaner

Provides helpers for sanitizing strings to a restricted ASCII character set.

BaseModelHelper

Base helper for locating and opening version-specific "container" Revit models from a configured folder.

Collector
ContainerModelHelper

Resolves and opens the ACCO "Project Container Model" for the current Revit version.

ConventionViewLocator

Resolves a WPF Window type for a given ViewModel type using a naming/namespace convention.

ElementIdHelper

Provides convenience conversion and helper methods for working with Autodesk.Revit.DB.ElementId across multiple Revit versions.

FabricationMaterialUtils

Utilities for working with fabrication materials via Autodesk.Revit.DB.FabricationConfiguration.

FabricationPartUtils

Utilities for creating and manipulating Revit fabrication parts and their connectors.

FamilyUtils

Provides helpers for locating and loading Revit families and family symbols (types) from the current document or disk.

FileDialogHelper

Provides file and folder pickers that are safe to use from within Revit, with explicit owner-window handling to ensure dialogs appear in front of Revit and do not get lost behind the main application window.

GenerateTypes
ImageUtils

Provides utilities for loading ribbon icons and contextual help resources for Revit UI elements.

InputHelper

Provides helpers for resolving user/project trade context from the active Revit document.

LevelUtils

Provides utility methods for determining the most frequently associated Autodesk.Revit.DB.Level for a set of elements.

MemoryScopeKeys

Provides stable string keys for scoping persisted UI/state data (for example, user preferences or cached selections).

MissingResourcesLoader

Detects missing Revit resources (view templates, schedule templates, families, and tag families) and provides helpers to load/copy them from known sources (disk and container models).

PdfUtils

PDF helper utilities for stamping and merging PDFs using iText 7.

ProgressBar
ReflectionUtils
RelayCommand
RelayCommand<T>
RevitInvoker
RevitMainWindowVisualUtils
RibbonUtils
RunMethod

Executes ExternalCommand implementations by name using reflection.

Select
Select.PickBox
SelectionHelper
SelectionMemoryEStorage
SelectionMemoryEStorage.SavedSelection
SleeveOpeningReplacementService
SleeveResult
SpoolingContainerModelHelper

Resolves and opens the "Spooling BOM Templates" container model for the current Revit version.

TagFamilyCatalogService

Builds and maintains an in-memory catalog of Revit tag family files (.rfa) discovered under one or more configured root directories. The catalog maps a family name (file name without extension) to its full file path, enabling fast lookup for UI picklists and family loading workflows.

TooltipFormatter
UnderlayLevelSelector
ViewModelHelper
ViewportAligner
WindowUtils
WorkshareUtils
XmlTagCommandConfig

Immutable configuration object for an XML-driven tagging command.

XmlTagPlacementResult
XmlTagPlacementRunner

Executes interactive tag placement driven by an XML annotation configuration.

XmlTagPlacementSummary
XmlTagUtils

Utility methods for reading annotation/tagging rules from the annotation configuration XML.

Enums

Select.SelectionOutcome
Made with docfx
